## Projector Details

**Model:** <!-- e.g. BenQ MH856UST -->

**Network interface:** <!-- Ethernet / WiFi -->
**Year purchased (approximate):** <!-- e.g. 2016 -->

---

## Compatibility Result

<!-- Select one -->
- [ ] ✅ Fully working — all features work
- [ ] ⚠️ Partially working — some features work (describe below)
- [ ] ❌ Not working — app cannot connect or control projector

---

## Feature Testing

| Feature | Status | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Auto-discovery | ✅ / ❌ / ⚠️ | |
| Power on/off | ✅ / ❌ / ⚠️ | |
| Power state (warming/cooling) | ✅ / ❌ / ⚠️ | |
| Lamp hours | ✅ / ❌ / ⚠️ | |
| Input switching | ✅ / ❌ / ⚠️ | |
| Volume control | ✅ / ❌ / ⚠️ | |
| Mute | ✅ / ❌ / ⚠️ | |
